recommendations.title: Trust No One: The Hunt for the Crypto King
recommendations.overview: When the young founder of a collapsing cryptocurrency exchange dies unexpectedly, irate investors suspect there's more to his death than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Outer Space
recommendations.overview: A young woman move towards a house that holds a potentially dangerous spirit that has been tormenting her. The woman tries to fight against the film itself as it starts to cause the world to collapse.

recommendations.title: Oracle
recommendations.overview: A young woman accepts a job on a property with a traumatic history. Upon her arrival, she soon realizes that the nightmares of her childhood are connected to the evil in the house.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Private Lesson
recommendations.overview: Posing as a private tutor, Azra secretly coaches students on achieving their goals in life and love — but not without a few bumps in the road.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: A young governess for two children becomes convinced that the house and grounds are haunted by ghosts and that the children are being possessed.

recommendations.title: Wer
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney begins to suspect that her client, who is charged with the murders of a vacationing family, might be more than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: The Tutor
recommendations.overview: When a professional tutor takes a job at a remote manor, he soon finds himself battling his disturbed student’s obsessions, which threaten to expose his darkest secrets and unravel his carefully crafted persona.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
recommendations.overview: When children start disappearing, a rebellious teen under house arrest starts to suspect that a legendary evil, a boogeyman known as the Cucuy, might be responsible.
